node.title: Uber phone Interview - Random odd number from the given array

topic.title: Uber phone Interview - Random odd number from the given array

post.content: what if the array does not have any odd number? I suppose your code will loop indefinitely.

For the second one, your solution will always run forever if there are no odd elements. Runtime will also be quite bad on avg if there are few odd elements compared to even elements.

There are 2 approaches to improve runtime to always be at least O(n) which is a lot better than O(inf).

1. Create an array with only odd elements: O(n) space.
2. Use reservoir sampling on only odd elements: O(1) space, and then talk with your interviewer to discuss what to do when there are no odd elements (return -1? Throw an exception? etc)
Here is my C++ solution.  O(N) time, O(1) space (although maybe it should really be O(N) space to be honest...see comments)\nhttps://leetcode.com/playground/pgDAiTw9/shared
Did you get invited to onsite or get the offer?\nI am curious because I got a very similar question.
O(n) space, O(n) time solution - https://leetcode.com/playground/PLGz8DMg
